query: Find TypeScript SDK examples for building a Google Ads API integration. Include authentication, permissions, rate limits, and implementation risks.
Explain Meta Marketing API permissions for campaign automation, including app review, required scopes, rate-limit risks, and the safest MVP implementation plan.
Research TikTok Ads API campaign automation capabilities. Cover authentication, campaign/ad group/ad creation, reporting access, permissions, and implementation risks.
Compare Stripe Billing API subscription lifecycle implementation details: customer creation, prices, subscriptions, invoices, webhooks, and common failure modes.
Research Shopify Admin API product creation and inventory update workflow. Include authentication, required permissions, rate limits, and GraphQL versus REST tradeoffs.
Explain GitHub REST API fine-grained personal access token permissions for repository search, contents access, issues, and pull requests. Include implementation risks.
Research Slack API OAuth scopes for a bot app that reads messages, posts replies, and searches channels. Include token types, permissions, and app review risks.
Research Notion API database querying limits and best practices. Include authentication, pagination, filtering, rate limits, and integration permissions.
Explain HubSpot CRM API contact, company, and deal association model. Include authentication, object APIs, association APIs, rate limits, and sync risks.
Research Salesforce REST API OAuth and object CRUD implementation. Include connected app setup, token flow, object metadata, limits, and integration risks.
Research OpenAI API structured outputs for production extraction workflows. Include schema constraints, model support, API usage pattern, and failure handling.
Research Anthropic API tool use for building an agent. Include message format, tool schemas, tool result handling, streaming, and implementation risks.
